zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Frazier於大約1447年出生在英國越可爾多卡斯特時，她的父親Hugh Hughill Fraser29歲，母親Margaret Violetta Lyon29歲。她於大約1470年與Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth在英國越可爾多卡斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國賀特福爾沃特福德享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Frazier于大约1447年出生在英国越可爾多卡斯特时，她的父亲Hugh Hughill Fraser29岁，母亲Margaret Violetta Lyon29岁。她于大约1470年与Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth在英国越可爾多卡斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国賀特福爾沃特福德享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Frazier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Fregeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Camille, Eloi, Fernand, Lucien, Michel, Normand.
French (Frégeau): metathesized form of Fergeau, from an old vernacular form of the Latin personal name Ferreolus, derived from ferrum ‘iron’. Compar Frazier .

variants.name: Fraser
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Frazier was born about 1447, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, her father, Hugh Hughill Fraser, was 29 and her mother, Margaret Violetta Lyon, was 29. She married Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth about 1470, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1510, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Frazier est née environ 1447, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Hughill Fraser, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Violetta Lyon, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth environ 1470, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Frazier(이)가 대략 1447년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Hughill Fraser(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Violetta Lyon(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 Sir John William Nicholas Carter of Cusworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.
